title: AI on Kubernetes? EKS Auto Mode Handles the Burst
summary: AWS EKS Auto Mode is a managed Kubernetes service designed to rapidly provision and manage GPU instances for AI workloads, minimizing idle time and reducing computational costs. The service handles burst scaling for serving AI models on Kubernetes clusters.
